title: Philadelphia fans chant ‘We want Boston’ ahead of playoff series vs. Celtics
author: Hayden Bird
bullets: Morning Sports Update Game 1 between Boston and Philadelphia gets underway on Sunday at TD Garden.
Philadelphia 76ers' Vj Edgecombe after scoring during the NBA play-in tournament win against the Magic.

AP Photo/Matt Slocum By Hayden Bird April 16, 2026 | 11:00 AM 3 minutes to read Philadelphia fans want Boston: On Wednesday, the 76ers defeated the Magic 109-97 in the NBA play-in tournament, putting them on a collision course with the Celtics in the upcoming first round of the postseason.

title: 4-year-old survives 7-story fall from Worcester apartment building
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: Local News The incident happened Wednesday evening.
A 4-year-old boy is in stable condition after falling from a seventh-floor window of a Worcester apartment building Wednesday evening, authorities say.
Police responded at about 7:21 p.

title: Sneaker company Allbirds plans to pivot to AI. Yes, AI.
author: New York Times Service
bullets: Business After selling its business for $39 million last month, the company said it planned to buy powerful computer chips and rebrand itself NewBird AI.
The shoe company Allbirds announced on Wednesday that it would “pivot its business” to artificial intelligence.
